evals.prompt: I need to upgrade my .NET for Android MatrixScan Count app from Scandit SDK v7 to v8. Here is my current Activity: ActivityV7.cs. What do I need to change?
evals.expected_output: The skill explains that v8 requires explicit SDK initialization in a MainApplication subclass — ScanditCaptureCore.Initialize() and ScanditBarcodeCapture.Initialize() must be called from OnCreate() before any Scandit type is constructed. The activity itself does not need changes — the BarcodeCount.Create factory, BarcodeCountView.Create factory, listener / Scanned event, BarcodeCountSession shape, camera handling, and capture-list APIs are all unchanged in v8. The skill also instructs the user to bump both Scandit.DataCapture.Core and Scandit.DataCapture.Barcode <PackageReference> versions to the latest stable v8 release. Provides the v7→v8 migration guide URL.

assertions.text: The skill explains that SDK 8.0+ requires explicit initialization via ScanditCaptureCore.Initialize() and ScanditBarcodeCapture.Initialize()
The skill instructs the user to create (or update) a MainApplication subclass decorated with [Application] and override OnCreate()
The initialization calls go into MainApplication.OnCreate() (or equivalent process-startup hook), not into MainActivity.OnCreate()
The skill instructs the user to bump both Scandit.DataCapture.Core and Scandit.DataCapture.Barcode PackageReference versions
The skill does NOT instruct the user to replace BarcodeCount.Create(...) with a different call — the factory is unchanged in v7→v8 and there is no public new BarcodeCount(...) constructor
The skill does NOT instruct the user to change the BarcodeCountView.Create(context, dataCaptureContext, barcodeCount[, style]) factory signature — it is unchanged in v7→v8
The skill does NOT instruct the user to remove the explicit Camera management (Camera.GetDefaultCamera / SetFrameSourceAsync / SwitchToDesiredStateAsync) — camera handling is unchanged
The skill does NOT introduce APIs that do not exist on dotnet.android (e.g. BarcodeCountMappingFlowSettings, BarcodeCountSessionSnapshot)

evals.prompt: I'm bumping the Scandit .NET Android MatrixScan Count SDK from v7 to v8. What source-code changes do I need to make?
evals.expected_output: The skill explains that v8 requires explicit SDK initialization via ScanditCaptureCore.Initialize() and ScanditBarcodeCapture.Initialize() called from a MainApplication.OnCreate() override. The BarcodeCount.Create factory, BarcodeCountView.Create factory, IBarcodeCountListener three-method interface, Scanned event, session shape, camera handling, and capture-list APIs are all unchanged. Provides the v7→v8 migration guide URL.

assertions.text: The skill explains that SDK 8.0+ requires explicit initialization via ScanditCaptureCore.Initialize() and ScanditBarcodeCapture.Initialize()
The skill instructs the user to create (or update) a MainApplication subclass decorated with [Application] and override OnCreate()
The initialization calls go into MainApplication.OnCreate() (or equivalent process-startup hook), not into MainActivity.OnCreate()
The skill states that the BarcodeCount.Create(...) factory is unchanged in v7→v8
The skill states that the BarcodeCountView.Create(...) factory is unchanged in v7→v8
